nasb.text: Now in the twelfth month (that is, the month Adar), on the thirteenth day when the king’s command and edict were about to be executed, on the day when the enemies of the Jews hoped to gain the mastery over them, it was turned to the contrary so that the Jews themselves gained the mastery over those who hated them.

esv.text: Now in the twelfth month, which is the month of Adar, on the thirteenth day of the same, when the king’s command and edict were about to be carried out, on the very day when the enemies of the Jews hoped to gain the mastery over them, the reverse occurred: the Jews gained mastery over those who hated them.

cnv.text: 十二月，就是亞達月，十三日，王的命令和諭旨快要執行的時候，就是猶大人的仇敵盼望轄制猶大人的日子，反成了猶大人轄制恨他們的人的日子。

ccb.text: 十二月，即亚达月十三日，是执行王谕旨的日子。那天，犹太人的仇敌原本想辖制他们，却反而被他们辖制。
